description: CAG India audit topics taxonomy. 33 top-level topics, 224 sub-topics. Derived from the Seventh, Eleventh and Twelfth Schedules of the Constitution of India. Used in inheritable_audit_metadata.topics[] at report and chapter level. IDs are snake_case strings. parent_id=null marks top-level topics. sub_topics[] on parent entries lists direct child IDs. INHERITANCE: ADDITIVE — chapter topics aggregate upward to report level.
usage_notes: Use the most specific applicable sub_topic ID, not the parent topic. Multiple IDs permitted. Set at REPORT level for report-wide themes; set at CHAPTER level for chapter-specific themes. Do not set at SECTION level. Pipeline aggregates: report.topics = union(explicit report.metadata.topics, all chapter.metadata.topics).
